name: Gradient Dye Workshop
description: Learn to hand-dye silk scarves in ombre pastels using traditional Realm techniques.

name: Cloud Couture Runway
description: Walk a suspended runway 300 feet above the Blush Plains and model the season's softest looks.

name: FREE Cotton Candy Market Tour
description: Stroll through an open-air market of pastel accessories, jewelry, and dreamy editorial pieces.

name: Velvet Tailoring Class
description: Learn to cut and hand-stitch a velvet garment piece with a master tailor in a candlelit studio.

name: Dark Editorial Photoshoot
description: Book a fully styled editorial shoot with a Noir District photographer in the iconic alley backdrops.

name: Midnight Atelier Tour
description: Get a private after-hours tour of the District's most secretive fashion ateliers and meet the designers.

name: Ocean Haul Design Lab
description: Collaborate with a local designer to turn real reclaimed ocean plastic into a wearable accessory.

name: FREE Neon Thrift Crawl
description: Hop between Plastika's famous upcycle boutiques hunting for one-of-a-kind recycled fashion finds.

name: Sustainable Sneaker Build
description: Build your own pair of sneakers from recycled rubber and reclaimed fabric in a guided workshop.
